# Pickleball Basics

Pickleball is a paddle sport. This short draft explains a few basics and the scoring idea.

## Court Setup
A court has a net and service areas.

## Scoring Basics
You can only score when serving.

## Common Mistakes
Players often hit into the kitchen zone by mistake.


## Practical Steps
1. Start with clear definitions.
2. Explain key rules/concepts.
3. Cover common mistakes and edge cases.
